---
title: "lecture_3_assignment"
author: "Emma Sayre"
date: "04/21/26"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: load libraries
#| #| include: false
#| echo: false

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| label: read in data
#| include: false
#| echo: false

data <- read.csv(here("Week 1/p301.csv"))
view(data)
```
